verse_text: And the Lord said to me, 'Drop them into the smelting furnace and see if it is proven, as in the same manner I was proven for their sake.' And I took the thirty pieces of silver and threw them into the smelting furnace in the house of the Lord.

links.context: The son of perdition ("destruction") is Judas Iscariot (6:70, 71). OT prophecy alludes to Judas ([[PSA.40:10]]; 108:2-13; [[ZEC.11:12]], [[ZEC.11:13]]), and Judas becomes a type for all who will fall away in the last days (see [[2TH.2:3]], where "son of perdition" refers to the Antichrist).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
